assertions.expectation: Identifies PDB as the most likely/common cause of stuck upgrades
assertions.reason: Response explicitly states 'Check PDBs first - this causes 80% of stuck upgrades' and identifies PodDisruptionBudgets as the most common cause

assertions.expectation: Provides kubectl command to check PDBs (kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces or similar)
assertions.reason: Provides 'kubectl get pdb --all-namespaces' command multiple times throughout the response

assertions.expectation: Provides commands to identify which pods are blocking the drain
assertions.reason: Includes commands like 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces --field-selector=status.phase!=Running,status.phase!=Succeeded' and commands to check nodes being upgraded

assertions.expectation: Includes resource constraint diagnosis (capacity issues, pending pods)
assertions.reason: Does not specifically address resource constraints, capacity issues, or pending pods as potential causes of the stuck upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides a fix for restrictive PDBs (patch or temporary adjustment)
assertions.reason: Provides kubectl patch commands to temporarily adjust PDBs: 'kubectl patch pdb [PDB_NAME] -n [NAMESPACE] --type merge -p '{"spec":{"minAvailable":0}}'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that GKE has a PDB timeout (up to 1 hour) after which it may force-drain, and that GKE sends notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB
assertions.reason: Does not mention GKE's PDB timeout mechanism or automatic notifications when eviction is blocked by PDB

assertions.expectation: Includes guidance on surge upgrade settings as a potential fix
assertions.reason: Provides specific commands for configuring surge settings: '--max-surge=2 --max-unavailable=1' and '--max-surge=3 --max-unavailable=1'

assertions.expectation: Mentions webhook issues as a possible cause
assertions.reason: Does not mention admission webhooks or validation webhooks as potential causes of stuck upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes validation steps to confirm the fix is working
assertions.reason: Provides commands to check upgrade status and monitor progress: 'kubectl get nodes -o wide' and 'gcloud container operations describe'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE disruption-event notifications (POD_PDB_VIOLATION) that alert when eviction is blocked by PDB, available via Cloud Logging or Pub/Sub
assertions.reason: Does not mention specific GKE disruption-event notifications, POD_PDB_VIOLATION events, or Cloud Logging/Pub/Sub integration for PDB violations
